title: Kai Pai La! Guaishou Da Dianying
titleRomaji: Kai Pai La! Guaishou Da Dianying
synopsis: Following a decline in the amount of monster movies created, Meng Qi, a director who is obsessed with the monster movie genre, becomes unsure about his persistence—he never expected that one day an actual monster would appear in front of him! In order to fulfill his dream, Meng Qi decides to cooperate with the demon girl Liya and help her shoot a demon themed movie. However, as the shooting progresses, Meng Qi discovers that things in the other world are closely related to him... (Source: Bilibili, translated)

tags.name: Time Manipulation
tags.description: Prominently features time-traveling or other time-warping phenomena.

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

tags.name: Cyberpunk
tags.description: Set in a future of advanced technological and scientific achievements that have resulted in social disorder.

title: Yu Shen Ji
synopsis: The film is based on Chinese mythology such as Journey to the West, bringing together numerous gods and goddesses to tell the legendary story of low-ranking gods who defy fate and change their destiny in a chaotic world where faith has collapsed.

title: Hua Qian Gu: Hua Hun Zhi Lu
titleRomaji: Hua Qian Gu: Hua Hun Zhi Lu
synopsis: A natural disaster, the Purple Magic Orchid grows wantonly in the valley where humans live. It can cause people to sink and even lose their lives. Only Hua Qiangu survived because of the protection of the Flower God Tree, but the baby infected with the Purple Magic Orchid poison brought by the mythical beast Phoenix from outside the valley broke the peace of Hua Qiangu. The king and queen of Hua Qiangu violated the ancestral precepts of Hua Qiangu not to allow outsiders to enter and took in the baby, named Princess Peony, and raised her to thrive. The Flower God Tree suddenly withered, and Princess Peony fell ill, which made Hua Qiangu suspicious of all living beings, and they petitioned the king to send Princess Peony away. The queen could not give up the mother-daughter relationship, and sought help from the Flower God Tree. She volunteered to sacrifice herself to go to the black enchantment to experience the calamity and let the flower soul come back, but due to the powerful power o

title: Futsuu no Seikatsu
synopsis: Ordinary life repeats itself every day. The succession of moments that we repeat over and over again is never the same, and everything changes and wavers. The moment we touch something, our consciousness can go to a place that does not exist anywhere in the past, nor in the future. In an uncertain and fluctuating world, only the feeling of the body touching something, which exists only in this present reality, can be recognized as “now”. That moment is lovely. (Source: YouTube description) Note: Premiered at the 75th Berlin International Film Festival on February 15, 2025

tags.name: No Dialogue
tags.description: This work contains no dialogue.

title: Curious Tales of a Temple
synopsis: Adapted from the most outstanding collection of Chinese classical short stories. Pu Songling, a scholar, stays overnight at Lanruo Temple. He is caught by two monsters, Toad and Turtle, and brought to the bottom of an ancient well to judge the quality of his stories. In a temple, a well, and a tree, classic chapters of Strange Stories, such as The Taoist Priest of Mount Laoshan, Lotus Princess, Nie Xiaoqian, Painted Skin, and Lady Lu, unfold one after another across the vicissitudes of life. Six story styles present an audio-visual feast of the most bizarre stories, the most emotional and the most fateful.

title: Dungeons & Television Pilot Film
titleNative: ダンジョン＆テレビジョン パイロットフィルム
synopsis: Independent pilot film to the series Dungeons & Television.

tags.name: Mixed Media
tags.description: Features a combination of different media and animation techniques. Often seen with puppetry, textiles, live action footage, stop motion, and more. This does not include works with normal usage of CGI in their production.

tags.name: Dungeon
tags.description: Prominently features a dungeon environment.

title: Onigara
synopsis: Long ago, there lived a young man named Yosuke in the village of Shiiba in Hyuuga. "I want enough money and possessions to live a luxurious life without having to work" Yohei abandoned his job in his impoverished village, where only barnyard millet, oxtail millet and beans could be grown. He fled into the mountains, where one night he witnessed a strange sight. A blue ogre clinging to a large cedar tree split its back, began to shed its skin and quickly transformed into a red ogre. Yosuke stole the shed skin, wore it and began committing crimes in the village. However, when he tried to take off the skin, he couldn't get it off no matter what he did... (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: Sparkling Friendship Racing: The Birth of Racers Hachuping and Kangchongping
titleRomaji: Banjjakineun Ujeong Racing: Racer Hachuupinggwa Kkangchongpingui Tansaeng
titleEnglish: Sparkling Friendship Racing: The Birth of Racers Hachuping and Kangchongping
titleNative: 반짝이는 우정 레이싱: 레이서 하츄핑과 깡총핑의 탄생
synopsis: Step into the world of Catch! Teenieping like never before—where speed meets sparkle and friendship fuels the finish line. In this special animated spin-off, Hyundai introduces Heartsping and Hoppingping, two rookie racers joining their very first racing team! Note: Premiered as part of the Youth Adventure 2025 exhibition at the Hyundai Motorstudio in Goyang, Korea

title: ZERO RISE
synopsis: In a hyper-competitive society, where the gap between rich and poor is widening,a flawless existence are demanded, and only the strongest survive. Struggling and writhing amidst it all, can they reclaim what they've lost...? Those who possess talent, yet have been pushed aside because of past mistakes or the circumstances they were born into. For them, a new beginning is offered — a hidden street basketball league known as ZERO RISE. Only those who fight their way to victory can erase their past scars and reclaim the stage. Not only trained basketball players can step into this fight. Risking it all and pushing themselves to the limit, every kind of underdog gathers. As they fight to RISE up from ZERO. (Source: ZERO RISE English site)

tags.name: Basketball
tags.description: Centers around the sport of basketball.

title: Genshin Impact "Star Odyssey"
synopsis: Looking up, she could see the night sky embracing all that is. In that moment, a thousand emotions crystallized into questions. Where hang the sun and moon? What canvas depicts the stars? The infinite universe and breadth of time question the smallness of man. Yet it is these small specimens of mortality who may embark on long voyages, the power to create miracles firmly within their grasp. (Source: YouTube description)

title: Shinja Zero no Megami-sama to Hajimeru Isekai Kouryaku
titleRomaji: Shinja Zero no Megami-sama to Hajimeru Isekai Kouryaku
titleNative: 信者ゼロの女神サマと始める異世界攻略
synonyms: Full Clearing Another World under a Goddess with Zero Believers
Clear the world like a game with the zero believer goddess
synopsis: RPG player Makoto Takatsuki is hurled into another world with awful skills and stats. But he soon meets a goddess named Noah, who asks him to become her 1st believer in return for blessings. (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Glass and Kumo
synopsis: Glass and Kumo shared a deep love but it did not last forever. In the lifetime that followed their parting, Glass gradually comes to understand the cycles of union and separation that one encounters in life. Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Graduation Project
tags.description: A work made by students in place of an exam, typically at higher levels of education, either as a work for the entire course or as a work for a specific year of a course.

title: Heya Nikki
synopsis: A diary of a woman in her twenties who lives far away from her hometown. Her room is warm, sometimes hot, and unsettling. Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Nini to Nene no Dai Dasshutsu
titleRomaji: Nini to Nene no Dai Dasshutsu
titleNative: ニニとネネのだいだっしゅつ
synopsis: Nini and Nene are twin kittens who go on adventures in their balloon ship, just like they are happily doing today. However, their journey takes an unexpected turn when a thunderstorm suddenly appears, striking their balloon and causing it to crash. They land on a large cloud and enter a nearby house to seek help. Inside, they meet a mysterious girl. Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Shinsei: Tamamizu Monogatari
synopsis: A young fox falls in love at first sight with a princess who visits a nearby flower garden. He is consumed by self-loathing because he knows, as a fox, he is too different and unworthy of the princess. Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)
